Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}No need to thank me.{nl}I just brought the truth to light.

Final_Victory.name: Maggey
Final_Victory.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}...But I still ended up{nl}dropping Ms. Nakaki, sir.

Final_Victory.name: Maggey
Final_Victory.text: That's the truth, isn't it, sir?

Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}No. She had already passed away by then.{nl}It couldn't be helped.

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: {fadeOutCharacter:600}{sprite:Maya["Happy"]}{fadeInCharacter:600}{blip:2}Nick, you were amazing!{nl}I was so moved!

Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}Thanks. But things only went well{nl}because of you, Maya.

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: {sprite:Maya["Determined"]}{blip:2}Oh, right!{nl}It's almost time for the Steel Samurai show!

Final_Victory.name: Maggey
Final_Victory.text: {fadeOutCharacter:600}{sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{fadeInCharacter:600}...Wait, wasn't the show canceled, sir?{nl}I mean, since Ms. Nakaki...

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: {fadeOutCharacter:600}{sprite:Maya["Happy"]}{fadeInCharacter:600}{blip:2}Actually, it looks like they're putting it on last minute.{nl}They say Detective Gumshoe is playing the Steel Samurai!

Final_Victory.name: Maya
Final_Victory.text: To celebrate you being cleared of all charges, Maggey!

Final_Victory.name: Phoenix
Final_Victory.text: {blip:1,false}Detective Gumshoe... I wonder if he'll be okay...{nl}Can he even fit into that suit?
{hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter:600}{fadeOutBg:600}{fadeBg:Ending,800}{p:4000}{fadeOutBg:1000}{stopBGM:true}{returnToTitle:"Congratulations, you won! See you next time!"}{sectionEnd}
